heading.class: h1 heading font-2 weight-700 heading-flex uppercase
heading.title: Контакты

items.content:
{% include 'components/heading.twig' with {'item': item.address.heading} %}
{% include 'components/icon-text.twig' with {icon: {src: item.icon.address.src, alt: item.icon.address.alt}, title: item.office.title} %}
{% include 'components/heading.twig' with {'item': item.connect.heading} %}
{% for phone in global.phones %}
{% include 'components/icon-text.twig' with {icon: {src: item.icon.phone.src, alt: item.icon.phone.alt}, link: {href: phone.href, title: phone.title}} %}
{% endfor %}
{% include 'components/icon-text.twig' with {icon: {src: item.icon.mail.src, alt: item.icon.mail.alt}, link: {href: global.email.href, title: global.email.title}} %}

heading.class: h5 heading font-2 weight-700 heading-flex uppercase
heading.title: Офис

heading.class: h5 heading font-2 weight-700 heading-flex uppercase
heading.title: Связаться с нами

items.content:
{% include 'components/heading.twig' with {'item': item.heading} %}
{% include 'components/form-callback.twig' with {'data': {'button': {'title': 'Отправить'}}} %}

heading.class: h5 heading font-2 weight-700 heading-flex uppercase
heading.title: Написать нам
